scenarioName: No news available — graceful empty report
description: When the stub news service returns zero articles (symbol contains 'NONEWS'), the analyst must state plainly that no articles were found rather than fabricating headlines.

input.userMessage: Analyse NONEWS and produce an analysis.

expectedBehavior.outputFormat: JSON MarketAnalysis whose newsReport explicitly acknowledges the absence of news.
expectedBehavior.decisionCriteria: Synthesised analysis must not invent headlines when the news tool reports zero articles.

scoring.passCriteria: Output contains 'NONEWS' and does not contain the word 'fabricated'.
